caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, dressed in a light-colored traditional Indian outfit consisting of a long-sleeved shirt and a sleeveless vest, stands behind a dark brown wooden lectern. He is delivering a speech in front of a textured green wall with a geometric pattern and a tall, cylindrical gold-colored column adorned with small pink flowers. Two microphones are positioned on the lectern in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and uses hand gestures to emphasize his points. Initially, he holds one hand slightly raised while speaking. As the scene progresses, he brings his hands together in front of him before raising his right arm and gesturing with his hand in the air, shifting his posture and gaze slightly as he continues to address the audience.
